items.name: TC_Pet_Portal_060 - Verify the "Upgrade To Total Wellness" option is displayed for Thrive Plus members at clinics that offer a Total Wellness plan and allows successful upgrade.

TC_Pet_Portal_066 - Except reason pet passed away- Verify clicking "Click Here For Cancellation" allows users to cancel auto-renewal and the "Cancel Autorenewal" option is no longer displayed after successful cancellation.
TC_Pet_Portal_058 - Verify clicking "Book Online" opens the appointment booking pop-up and allows successful appointment booking.
TC_Pet_Portal_041 - Verify the "Remove Pet" button is displayed for pets without enrollment or bookings and removes the pet successfully.
TC_Pet_Portal_068 - Verify users must verify their phone number before enabling any Text communication preference toggle.
TC_Pet_Portal_056_059_062 - Verify the "Cancel Autorenewal" and Verify clicking "Yes, Enroll Now" and Verify clicking "Add Pet" in Pet Portal
TC_Pet_Portal_057_067 - Reason Pet passed away- follow the memorialize flow and are no longer displayed in Thrive Plus Membership
TC_Pet_Portal_031_034 - Verify enroll Thrive Plus/ Total Wellness membership and Verify Manage Membership
TC_Pet_Portal_032 - Verify upgrade from Thrive Plus to Total Wellness membership successfull
TC_Pet_Portal_032 - Pet Profile Verify upgrade from Thrive Plus to Total Wellness membership unsuccessfull
